title: Sharpz's Garage System
description: This mod adds garages to Immersive Vehicles
body:
Just a mod that adds garage system to Immersive Vehicles

**[IMMERSIVE VEHICLES REQUIRED](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-vehicles)**

**This mod was tested on 1.20.1 with [KMW](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/kaminari-motor-works)**

**Features:**
- Stores vehicles in garages
- Spawns vehicles using a spawn pad
- Vehicle ownership system
- Technical Certificate (vehicle key) system

**Commands:** 
- /garage list - shows a list of your cars which are in your garage
- /garage claim - gives you a car certificate
- /garage spawn [slot_number] - spawns a specific vehicle
- /garage store - stores your vehicle
- /give [your_name] ivgarage:garage_spawn_pad
- /give [your_name] ivgarage:garage_terminal

**KEEP IN MIND THAT THIS PROJECT IS BEING DEVELOPED BY ONE PERSON**
